This page is protected to prevent harmful edits. Contact an administrator if you want to suggest changes to the page.

If you think this page should be unprotected, then use {{unprotect}} on the talk page.

Wands are used only by sorcerers. They deal damage and use a small amount of mana. Druids cannot use Wands, they use rods instead.

Wands are One-Handed, so they can be used together with a shield or spellbook, and they fire every turn. Unlike normal weapons, they can fire from a distance.

Wands cause Death, Earth, Energy, Fire or Ice Damage, depending upon the wand. A benefit of this is that every hit causes damage and the damage is not mitigated by the creature's armor. The drawback is that some creatures are immune to these types of damage and with the high level wands you can run out of mana very quickly if you hunt without stop for a while.

Charged Wands could be made until Summer Update 2017. They were later merged into their respective base weapons which had become imbuable.

  • Wands
  • Charged Wand Replicas

Name Lvl Dmg Dmg Type Range Mana per Shot Resist. Imb. Slots Class. Weight Attributes Dropped By

Replicas of Charged Weapons can be bought from Cillia on Sundays for 500 gp each. All charged weapon replicas have no level requirement, resistance, skill boost, imbuement slot nor any other column that has been omitted on the table below. Moreover, all of them are in classification group one. They were implemented on Summer Update 2017.

Name Dmg Dmg Type Range Mana per Shot Class. Weight Dropped By
Ornate Carving Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Ornate Mayhem Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Ornate Remedy Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Plain Carving Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Plain Mayhem Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Plain Remedy Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Valuable Carving Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Valuable Mayhem Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Valuable Remedy Wand 0-10 3 5 1 35.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

Misc Wands[]

  • Magic Light Wand - Provides light
  • Crystal Wand - Decoration only
  • Spellwand - Turns you or some one else into monsters or spawns a Mad Sheep

See also:


Rods, Old Wands, Replicas, and Charged Wands
